name: Minestrini De Patate
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in water to cover for 20 minutes.
2. Drain and mash the potatoes.
3. Saute onion in butter and oil until softened, about 3 minutes.
4. Add celery and cook another minute.
5. Stir in Parmesan cheese, salt, milk, and chicken broth.
6. Simmer for 3 minutes.
7. Mix in parsley and serve with grated cheddar cheese.
